title: Portuguese Pudding with Honey and Fruit
description: A sweet and creamy Portuguese-style pudding made with honey and clear gelatin, a delicious vegetarian dessert option.
instructions: Dissolve gelatin in boiling water and let it cool.
In a separate bowl, mix together pudding, honey, custard powder, and milk.
Add the cooled gelatin mixture to the pudding mixture and whisk until smooth.
Pour the mixture into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Serve chilled, garnished with fresh fruit if desired.
